news.headline: US bank deposits fell to $17.896 trln from $17.904 trln in the prior week.
Trump on Minerals Deal With Ukraine: Pretty close.
Trump: We'll sign the digital tax tariff memo maybe today.
Massive crypto hack at Bybit surpasses second largest exploit at Ronin Network, making it biggest in history.
news.summary: The Bybit hack is over twice the size of the second-largest crypto exploit, that being associated with the Ronin Network.

news.headline: Nathan Sikes promoted to Senior Vice President of Western Operations at Boise Cascade's BMD division. Effective Feb 24, 2025. Joined company in 2006.
news.summary: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) based in Boise, Idaho, has appointed Nathan Sikes as the Senior Vice President of Western Operations for their Building Materials Distribution (BMD) division. Starting February 24, 2025, Nathan will oversee BMD’s facilities and door shops in the Western and Pacific Regions. Nathan has been with Boise Cascade since 2006, serving in various leadership roles. This new position reflects his extensive experience and dedication within the company.

news.headline: Trump: Apple will spend a lot of money in the US.
Swiss Helvetia Fund held special meeting, approved investment changes and special cash distribution of 30% net assets.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, The Swiss Helvetia Fund, Inc. (NYSE: SWZ) convened a special meeting of stockholders to address two main agenda items. Firstly, to consider an investment advisory agreement with Bulldog Investors, LLP, and secondly, to discuss amendments to the Fund’s investment objective and restrictions for broadening the scope of allowable investments. All proposals were successfully passed during the Meeting. The Board of Directors subsequently revealed plans to sell off a major portion of the Fund's portfolio securities and to announce a special cash distribution equivalent to around 30% of the Fund’s net assets, predominantly comprising long-term capital gains.

news.headline: Arhaus will announce Q4 and 2024 full year results on Feb 26, 2025.
news.summary: In the recent report, it was stated that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 3.5% in the upcoming year. This growth is expected to be driven by robust consumer spending and a steady increase in investments. Furthermore, the unemployment rate is forecasted to decrease to around 5.8%, indicating a positive trend in job creation. On the other hand, inflation is estimated to rise by 2.5%, which could pose challenges for central banks in maintaining price stability. Overall, the outlook for the global economy looks promising, with steady growth and improving employment prospects in the foreseeable future.

Triumph Financial (Nasdaq: TFIN) CEO to present at Raymond James Conference in Orlando on March 5 at 11:35am ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Triumph Financial, Inc. (Nasdaq: TFIN) disclosed that Aaron Graft, the Vice Chairman and CEO, is set to speak at the Raymond James & Associates’ 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 5 in Orlando, Florida. The presentation by Triumph Financial, Inc. is supposed to commence at 11:35 a.m. ET, and will be broadcasted live. For access, individuals can use this direct link: https://wsw.com/webcast/rj131/tfin/1599201 or visit the Company's website at tfin.com through the News & Events, Events & Presentations section.

news.headline: Walmart's weak outlook raises concerns, Fed cautious on inflation. Chinese stocks surge. Wall Street wary. Fed highlighted inflation risks and policy uncertainties. Rates could stay high if strong economic conditions persist. Inflation risks from trade, supply chain disruptions, and consumer spending.
news.summary: Stocks on Wall Street decreased slightly from their record highs as concerns arose over consumer spending and economic growth following Walmart's disappointing outlook. The Federal Reserve's minutes from the latest meeting revealed a cautious approach, indicating a need for further evidence of cooled inflation before potential rate cuts. Some policymakers proposed maintaining high rates if economic conditions and inflation levels remained robust, while highlighting inflation risks from trade and immigration policy changes, geopolitical tensions, and unexpectedly strong consumer spending. President Donald Trump also announced plans earlier in the week regarding...

news.headline: Albertsons Companies, Inc. in Boise announced changes to its Board of Directors today.
news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, a leading company, Albertsons Companies, Inc., unveiled modifications to its Board of Directors.

news.headline: Trump: The EU is now being very nice and I want to lower barriers.
Getty Images refinances around $1.042 billion in existing term loans, aimed at maturation in 2026.
news.summary: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GETY), a prominent global visual content creator and marketplace, revealed on February 21, 2025, that they have successfully completed a thorough refinancing of their existing term loans. The loans, which were originally due to mature on February 19, 2026, have now been restructured.

news.headline: BitMEX removes 10 derivatives contracts, settled before time on February 21, 2025, impacting traders.
news.summary: BitMEX made a recent decision to delist 10 derivatives contracts, which were settled prematurely on February 21, 2025. This action impacts traders who had positions in these specific contracts.

news.headline: Avidity Biosciences grants were made under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on Feb 20, 2025. Exciting news for the biopharmaceutical firm.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in San Diego, California, Avidity Biosciences, Inc., a biopharmaceutical firm traded on Nasdaq under the symbol RNA, revealed its focus on advancing a novel type of RNA therapeutics known as Antibody Oligonucleotide Conjugates (AOCs™). The company proclaimed that the Human Capital Management event that occurred on February 20, 2025, marked a significant development for their initiative.

news.headline: HEI reported $1.426 billion net loss for 2024, $11.23 per share, compared to $199 million net income, $1.81 per share in 2023. Core income was $124 million, $0.98 per share.
news.summary: In Honolulu, Hawaiian Electric Industries, Inc. announced a net loss of $1,426 million for the full year 2024, equivalent to $11.23 per share. This is a significant decrease compared to the net income of $199 million, or $1.81 per share, reported in 2023. Excluding discontinued operations, Maui wildfire expenses, and the Pacific Current asset impairment in the third quarter, the Core income from continuing operations was $124 million, or $0.98 per share, down from $152 million, or $1 per share. The company trades on the NYSE under the symbol HE.

news.headline: Penumbra, Inc. reveals retirement of Don Kassing from Board of Directors after 17 years; effective April 1, 2025.
news.summary: Alameda, California - Penumbra, Inc. (NYSE: PEN), a prominent thrombectomy company, revealed on February 21, 2025, that Don Kassing, a board member for 17 years, will retire from his position on April 1, 2025. Penumbra, known as a global leader in thrombectomy procedures, will see a significant change with Kassing's departure from the board after nearly two decades of service.

news.headline: Discover the surge in inflation expectations - Check out details.
HP Inc. appoints Gianluca Pettiti to Board of Directors, a global life sciences executive. Effective immediately.
news.summary: HP Inc. based in Palo Alto, California, revealed on February 21, 2025, that Gianluca Pettiti has been appointed to its Board of Directors. Pettiti currently serves as the Executive Vice President and President of Life Sciences, Diagnostics, and Applied at Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc., a worldwide life sciences corporation. The appointment of Mr. Pettiti is now in effect.

news.headline: Jesse Gary to present at BMO 2025 Global Metals Conference on Feb 25, 10am EST. Century Aluminum Company announced.
news.summary: Century Aluminum Company (NASDAQ: CENX) revealed on February 21, 2025, that their President and CEO, Jesse Gary, is scheduled to speak and engage in a Q&A session at the BMO Global Metals, Mining, & Critical Minerals Conference. The session is set to commence around 10:00 a.m. EST on Tuesday, February 25, 2025.

news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. closes $3.0M public offering, selling 1.5M shares at $2 each; total $3.0M gross proceeds.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (Nasdaq: INBS), a medical technology company specializing in intelligent, rapid, non-invasive testing solutions, closed its underwritten public offering. The offering involved 1,500,000 shares of common stock at a price of $2.00 per share, with an additional 195,652 shares sold due to the underwriter's full exercise of their purchase option. The total gross proceeds from the offering reached around $3.0 million, before accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated offering expenses.

news.headline: Navient sells Government Services business to Gallant Capital Partners, LLC; finalized on Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Navient disclosed the completion of the divestiture of its Government Services division to Gallant Capital Partners, LLC, an affiliate based in Los Angeles. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol NAVI.

news.headline: Leadership transition announced at eXoZymes Inc. in Monrovia, CA. Key changes in board of directors. Stock symbols: EXOZ, MDBH.
news.summary: Monrovia, CA - On February 21, 2025, eXoZymes Inc. revealed significant leadership changes as a pioneer in AI-engineered enzymes that convert sustainable feedstock into crucial chemicals, medicines, and biofuels. Formerly known as Invizyne Technologies, the company trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol EXOZ. MDB Capital Holdings (NASDAQ: MDBH), a leading venture platform for cutting-edge technology firms, joined eXoZymes in announcing the modifications to the board of directors.

news.headline: TELA Bio offers 7,200 restricted stock unit grants to 13 new employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: MALVERN, Pa., Feb. 21, 2025 - TELA Bio, Inc. ("TELA Bio"), a medical technology company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TELA, has disclosed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors has given the green light to offering inducement grants. These grants include restricted stock units for 13 newly recruited employees, totaling 7,200 shares of TELA Bio's common stock. The grant was approved on February 19, 2025, following the Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) inducement grant exception. These stock units are deemed essential components of the employees' compensation packages and were offered to attract them to join TELA Bio.

The Marketing Alliance reports Q3 FY2025 financial results ended Dec 31, 2024 in St. Louis.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in St. Louis, The Marketing Alliance, Inc. (OTC: MAAL) disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal 2025 third quarter concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: UFG declares $0.16 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 21, 2025 to shareholders of record by March 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Cedar Rapids, Iowa, on February 21, 2025, the Board of Directors of United Fire Group, Inc. ("UFG") (Nasdaq: UFCS) announced a quarterly cash dividend for its common stock, set at $0.16 per share. Shareholders of record as of March 7, 2025, will receive this dividend on March 21, 2025.

news.headline: Marten Transport (Nasdaq: MRTN) declares $0.06 quarterly dividend, payable on March 28 to shareholders on record as of March 14.
news.summary: Mondovi, Wisconsin- On February 21, 2025, Marten Transport, Ltd. (Nasdaq/GS:MRTN) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per common stock share. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on March 28, 2025, to stockholders listed on record as of the market close on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Dollarama (TSX: DOL) to announce Q4 & fiscal year 2025 results on April 3, 2025; Call at 7:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Montreal-based Dollarama Inc. (TSX: DOL) has announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on February 2, 2025, on April 3, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. (ET). Alongside this release, management will conduct a conference call to analyze the results on the same day. Investors and analysts are invited to participate in this discussion to gain insights into the company's financial standing for that period.

news.headline: Co-Diagnostics plans to submit an improved COVID-19 test for FDA approval after withdrawing due to shelf-life stability concerns.
news.summary: The Company announced on Feb. 21, 2025, that it is retracting its current submission due to FDA guidance regarding the shelf-life stability of a critical test component. Co-Diagnostics, Inc. (Nasdaq-CM: CODX), a molecular diagnostics firm, is taking this action.

news.headline: ZachXBT attributes $1.4B Bybit hack to Lazarus Group, rewarded with Arkham bounty. X community offers support and security tips for affected users.
news.summary: Following a security breach on the Bybit exchange resulting in a loss exceeding $1.4 billion, members of the cryptocurrency community on platform X rallied to provide assistance and offer guidance on enhancing security measures for users affected by the incident.

news.headline: Expedia Group closed $1 billion Senior Notes Offering of 5.400% due 2035 at 99.316% price with $994 million net proceeds.
news.summary: Expedia Group, Inc. revealed the successful completion of its Senior Notes Offering where $1 billion worth of unsecured 5.400% Senior Notes due 2035 were issued. The Senior Notes, guaranteed by select subsidiaries of Expedia Group, were sold at 99.316% of their principal amount, carrying a 5.400% coupon. This move aims to generate net proceeds for the company.

news.headline: KB Home offers new townhome-style condo in prime San Francisco East Bay location in Castro Valley, California.
news.summary: A rare chance to purchase a new townhome-style condo in a prime East Bay location in San Francisco has been announced by KB Home, a company known for its strong emphasis on relationships. The townhome offers a unique living experience in Castro Valley, California.

Carvana's earnings drop causes shares to slide, impacting CarGurus and ACV Auctions. Online car sellers face collapse.
news.summary: Carvana reported a decline in earnings, leading to a drop in its shares. CarGurus and ACV Auctions also experienced a decrease in their stock prices on Friday. The online car selling industry witnessed a downturn as Carvana initiated a sharp decline.

news.headline: MP Materials on track to make auto-grade magnets for GM; received price-target boosts after Q4 results.
news.summary: After reporting strong Q4 results, MP Materials received two price-target increases. The company is set to produce automotive-grade magnets for GM. This development has propelled MP Materials to its buy point, indicating a positive trajectory as its vision materializes.

news.headline: PDD Holdings ADR stock's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating rises from 94 to 97, a significant improvement.
news.summary: On Friday, PDD Holdings ADR experienced a rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, moving from 94 to 97. This increase signifies a positive trend in the company's performance as reflected in its updated rating.

news.headline: Tesla stock is down while BYD rises on self-driving initiatives. Tesla to deliver Model Y in China, BYD surges.
news.summary: Deliveries of the new Model Y by Tesla in China are set to commence this month. Meanwhile, the EV company BYD has experienced a significant increase, reaching new highs due to its focus on self-driving technology. The stock of Tesla, TSLA, has continued its decline while BYD has soared due to its advancements in autonomous driving.
